title: Retail Orders
description: Order-level retail data with duplicates, missing revenue and regional categories.
suggestedQuestions: Which region generates the most revenue?
Which products have the highest average order value?
How many duplicate orders exist?
How should missing revenue be handled?

title: Customer Support Tickets
description: Support-ticket records for analysing response time, priority and resolution outcomes.
suggestedQuestions: Which channel has the longest average response time?
Are high-priority tickets resolved more quickly?
Which team handles the largest volume?
What is the overall resolution rate?

title: Job Skills Market
description: A compact job-market dataset for comparing roles, locations and recurring technical skills.
suggestedQuestions: Which skills appear most frequently?
Which roles are most often remote?
How do locations differ by salary band?
What skills overlap across analyst and engineering roles?

title: Trade Processing Exceptions
